subject: fix(pwa): suppress false beforeinstallprompt warning in standalone mode
body:
The diagnostic warning "No beforeinstallprompt after 5s" fired even when
the app was already running as an installed PWA. The event never fires in
standalone mode, so the warning was a false positive. Added isStandalone
guard to the effect and a re-check inside the timeout to handle the race
where standalone state updates during the 5s delay.

Tags: pwa, debug, mobile
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
